TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Taoyuan, title = Taoyuan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taoyuan} }

S.FORM: Taoyuan Itini i Kaohsiung ko Taoyuan. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko969.43 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 871.9 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 86.77 km²), 4,172 ko tamdaw i Taoyuan, 1,320 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 3,872 a tamdaw, pakaala to 93%(Bunun, Hla'alua) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun, Hla'alua ko sa'alomanay i Kaohsiung. O kasaniyarona 8 ko cun, 14 ko niyaro' i Taoyuan. Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan , Rʉhlʉcʉ/Haising , Su'aci , Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni .
S.PHON: tao~ujo~u~uan itini i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u tao~ujo~u~uan. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.* km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i tao~ujo~u~uan, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i tao~ujo~u~uan. ʦio~u~usinɾo~u~un , ħo~u~usiɬ~ɮa , tamaħo~u~u , s*ħɾ*ŋan*/so~u~uɾo~u~uŋan , r*ħɾ*ʦ*/ħaisiŋ , so~u~uʡaʦi , kaɾ*b~v*ŋa/ŋani , taŋo~u~uħɾa/ɬ~ɮinkam , mi*o~u~uħo~u~u , o~u~ua-asik , ɾab~vo~u~uɾan , ɬ~ɮako~u~us , maso~u~uħo~u~ua* , ɬ~ɮai-ni .
S.FORM: Taoyuan Itini i Kaohsiung ko Taoyuan. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko969.43 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 871.9 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 86.77 km²), 4,172 ko tamdaw i Taoyuan, 1,320 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 3,872 a tamdaw, pakaala to 93%(Bunun, Hla'alua) no polong no tamdaw. o Bunun, Hla'alua ko sa'alomanay i Kaohsiung. O kasaniyarona 8 ko cun, 14 ko niyaro' i Taoyuan. Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan , Rʉhlʉcʉ/Haising , Su'aci , Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni .
S.PHON: tao~ujo~u~uan itini i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u tao~ujo~u~uan. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.* km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i tao~ujo~u~uan, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i kao~uħsio~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i tao~ujo~u~uan. ʦio~u~usinɾo~u~un , ħo~u~usiɬ~ɮa , tamaħo~u~u , s*ħɾ*ŋan*/so~u~uɾo~u~uŋan , r*ħɾ*ʦ*/ħaisiŋ , so~u~uʡaʦi , kaɾ*b~v*ŋa/ŋani , taŋo~u~uħɾa/ɬ~ɮinkam , mi*o~u~uħo~u~u , o~u~ua-asik , ɾab~vo~u~uɾan , ɬ~ɮako~u~us , maso~u~uħo~u~ua* , ɬ~ɮai-ni .
